name: Yellow Dragon Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned, except with the effect of a "Ninja" monster or "Ninjitsu Art" card. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 "Ninja" monster and 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY, then target up to 2 Spells/Traps on the field; destroy them.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except with the effect of a "Ninja" monster or "Ninjitsu Art" card. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 "Ninja" monster and 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY, then target up to 2 Spells/Traps on the field; destroy them.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except with the effect of a "Ninja" monster or "Ninjitsu Art" card. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 "Ninja" monster and 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY, then target up to 2 Spells/Traps on the field; destroy them.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost

summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
